heuristic: Approximate file size heuristic (no Docker/base_commit checkout available): parse all '@@ -N' hunk start lines from gold_patch; require max(N) > 200. A patch that starts at line >200 implies the file has at least 200+ lines of context before the change, reliably indicating >4000 chars for typical Python source files. Tasks are ranked by max hunk start (descending) and top ≥3 selected. Evidence from trajectory read_file observations (truncated at ≥3990 chars) would provide direct confirmation but was not required to select candidates.
